meaning: n.汗衫,背心,内衣vt.使穿衣服,授予vi.穿衣服,归属
examples: His life was saved by a quarter-inch-thick bullet-proof vest.
That is not my vest. My vest is red.
By the way, the fleece vest over a button-down shirt thing originated at SAC.
He wore black jeans, sneakers without socks, and a vest over a white T-shirt.
